Canyon Layer 1.requires: |Canyon Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 1|)

The Divide 1.requires: |The Divide Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 2|)

Freezer Layer 1.requires: |Freezer Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 2|)

Freezer Layer 2a.requires: |Freezer Layer Key: 2| and (|Zebra Bananza| or |Freezer Layer Key: 3| or {YamlEnabled(i_know_afats)})

Forest Layer 1.requires: |Forest Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 2|)

The Junction 1.requires: |The Junction Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 2|)

Resort Layer 1.requires: |Resort Layer Key| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 3|)

Tempest Layer 1.requires: |Tempest Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 3|)

Tempest Layer 4.requires: |Elephant Bananza| or (|Ostrich Bananza| and |Glide: 1|) or {YamlEnabled(i_know_afats)} or |Obtain Soggy Cravat|

Landfill Layer 1.requires: |Landfill Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 3|)

Radiance Layer 1.requires: |Radiance Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 3|)

Groove Layer 1.requires: |Groove Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 3|)

Feast Layer 1.requires: |Feast Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 4|)

Forbidden Layer 1.requires: |Forbidden Layer Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 4|)

Planet Core 1.requires: |Planet Core Key: 1| and ({YamlDisabled(terrain_destruction_logic)} or |Kong Bananza| or |Elephant Bananza| or |Punch Power: 4|)
